title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays a gentle peek-a-boo game with sleepy animals hiding around her bedroom before settling down for the night.

pages.text: Yuki is ready for bed! But where are all her sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes stands in a cozy bedroom wearing pajamas, looking around curiously with animal tails and ears peeking out from behind furniture
illustration.alt: Yuki in pajamas looking around her bedroom with animal parts partially visible

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Is someone behind the curtain? Yes! It's sleepy Bear!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulling back a bedroom curtain to reveal a drowsy teddy bear hiding behind it, with the bear's paw previously visible
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering a sleepy teddy bear hiding behind a curtain

pages.text: Who's under the blanket? Peek-a-boo! It's sleepy Bunny with droopy ears!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a soft blanket to reveal a yawning white bunny underneath, with just the bunny's ears previously showing
illustration.alt: Yuki lifting a blanket to find a yawning bunny hiding underneath

pages.text: Look behind the pillow! Peek-a-boo! Sleepy Mouse is ready for dreams!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes moving a fluffy pillow to discover a tiny gray mouse curled up sleepily, with the mouse's tail previously peeking out
illustration.alt: Yuki finding a sleepy mouse hiding behind a pillow

pages.text: Now all friends are sleepy! Yuki closes her eyes. Peek-a-boo... good night!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked in bed with eyes gently closed, surrounded by the sleepy bear, bunny, and mouse all peacefully sleeping nearby
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully in bed with all her animal friends sleeping around her

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Who was hiding behind the curtain?
questions.explanation: The sleepy Bear was hiding behind the curtain when Yuki played peek-a-boo!

questions.question: Where was the bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: The bunny with droopy ears was hiding under the soft blanket!

questions.question: What did Yuki say at the end?
questions.explanation: Yuki said 'Good night!' after playing peek-a-boo with all her sleepy friends!
